title: Strange Trinkets
description: Included some practical charms to reduce game difficulty
body:
**Iron Ring:** The foundational ring type.

**Gold Ring:** Provides +1 Luck, but with modest stat boosts.

**Netherite Ring:** The enhanced successor to the Gold Ring, delivering maximum stat bonuses and fire resistance.

**Gemstones for Ring Embedding:**

Amethyst: Extends the range at which entities can be interacted with.

Emerald: Increases the damage dealt by the wearer.

Diamond: Provides additional armor protection.
